[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 12/19 (Tue)!
Pick-Up Student: 3★ Moe

Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 12/19 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 12/26 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
